originalFamilyScopeSummary: Add Related Markets rail to mobile market detail pages for cross-market discovery
currentTriggerSummary: pr-complete: feat(perps): market detail - Related Markets [NOT-READY]
notes: Operator unblocked the PR: main was merged (controller bumped @metamask/perps-controller ^7.0.0 -> ^8.0.0, which 8.0.0 makes the source of truth for market categories). Merge committed at aac89afd39; the single conflict (tests/feature-flags/feature-flag-registry.ts) resolved by keeping both perpsRelatedMarkets and perpsTopMoversEnabled. aganglada's blocking review (relatedMarkets.ts: 'logic should be on the controller, missing the new categories') is now addressed: relatedMarkets.ts derives categories from the controller's MARKET_CATEGORIES via the shared marketCategoryMapping/usePerpsCategories model (singular MarketTypeFilter ids), dropping the bespoke static map and equity bucketing. Every controller category (crypto/stock/pre-ipo/index/etf/commodity/forex) is now supported with no stale plural ids. relatedMarkets + PerpsRelatedMarkets tests 10/10 pass; ESLint + Prettier clean on changed files; incremental type-check run. Original family scope (Related Markets rail for cross-market discovery) is implemented and the blocking review resolved, hence full-scope-addressed. Not pushed (interactive run); operator finalizes push + re-review request.
